description:
ESTABLISHED PAST RELATIONSHIP

> Killer Telamon <

SCENARIO ; After dying in a rather unfortunate way, you wake up to find yourself Forsakend. With no memories of your past, and sourrounded by unfamiliar faces— you're left to question why the only thing remaining in your posession is a single, golden feather.

A new map brings back old memories.

Honestly I'm not very good at Bio's. LOL. ☆

I may make more bots if people actually like this. Any bad reviews that are NOT helpful or are just blatantly rude— will be ignored. ☆

I did not write any survivors into this bot, giving you full freedom. ☆

Update ; tested the bot a bit. Why the fuck does he think were in a cabin? ☆

Fixed ; hopefully. ☆

ANYWAYS

I'm just trying to make the Bio longer so it lookes more professional.. or something. ☆
